text: hmsh' 'shr chzh chbqvq hnby'

lmh tr'ny 'vn v'ml tbyt vshd vchms lngdy vyhy ryb vmdvn ysh'

r'v bgvym vhbytv vhtmhv tmhv khy-f'l f'l bymykhm l' t'mynv khy ysfr

'ym vnvr' hv' mmnv mshftv vsh'tv yts'
vqlv mnmrym svsyv vchdv mz'by 'rb vfshv frshyv vfrshyv mrchvq yb'v y'fv khnshr chsh l'khvl
khlh lchms ybv' mgmt fnyhm qdymh vy'sf khchvl shby
vhv' bmlkhym ytqls vrznym mshchq lv hv' lkhl-mbtsr yshchq vytsbr 'fr vylkhdh
'z chlf rvch vy'br v'shm zv khchv l'lhv
hlv' 'th mqdm yhvh 'lhy qdshy l' nmvt yhvh lmshft shmtv vtsvr lhvkhych ysdtv
thvr 'ynym mr'vt r' vhbyt 'l-'ml l' tvkhl lmh tbyt bvgdym tchrysh bbl' rsh' tsdyq mmnv
vt'shh 'dm khdgy hym khrmsh l'-mshl bv
khlh bchkhh h'lh ygrhv bchrmv vy'sfhv bmkhmrtv 'l-khn yshmch vygyl
'l-khn yzbch lchrmv vyqtr lmkhmrtv khy bhmh shmn chlqv vm'khlv br'h
h'l khn yryq chrmv vtmyd lhrg gvym l' ychmvl    s
'l-mshmrty ''mdh v'tytsbh 'l-mtsvr v'tsfh lr'vt mh-ydbr-by vmh 'shyb 'l-tvkhchty
vy'nny yhvh vy'mr khtvb chzvn vb'r 'l-hlchvt lm'n yrvts qvr' bv
khy 'vd chzvn lmv'd vyfch lqts vl' ykhzb 'm-ytmhmh chkhh-lv khy-b' yb' l' y'chr
hnh 'flh l'-yshrh nfshv bv vtsdyq b'mvntv ychyh
v'f khy-hyyn bvgd gbr yhyr vl' ynvh 'shr hrchyb khsh'vl nfshv vhv' khmvt vl' yshb' vy'sf 'lyv khl-hgvym vyqbts 'lyv khl-h'mym
hlv'-'lh khlm 'lyv mshl ysh'v vmlytsh chydvt lv vy'mr hvy hmrbh l'-lv 'd-mty vmkhbyd 'lyv 'btyt
hlv' ft' yqvmv nshkhykh vyqtsv mz'z'ykh vhyyt lmshsvt lmv
khy 'th shlvt gvym rbym yshlvkh khl-ytr 'mym mdmy 'dm vchms-'rts qryh vkhl-yshby bh  f
hvy bts' bts' r' lbytv lshvm bmrvm qnv lhntsl mkhf-r'
y'tst bsht lbytkh qtsvt-'mym rbym vchvt' nfshkh
khy-'bn mqyr tz'q vkhfys m'ts y'nnh  f
hvy bnh 'yr bdmym vkhvnn qryh b'vlh
hlv' hnh m't yhvh tsb'vt vyyg'v 'mym bdy-'sh vl'mym bdy-ryq y'fv
khy tml' h'rts ld't 't-khbvd yhvh khmym ykhsv 'l-ym    s
hvy mshqh r'hv msfch chmtkh v'f shkhr lm'n hbyt 'l-m'vryhm
shb't qlvn mkhbvd shth gm-'th vh'rl tsvb 'lykh khvs ymyn yhvh vqyqlvn 'l-khbvdkh
khy chms lbnvn ykhskh vshd bhmvt ychytn mdmy 'dm vchms-'rts qryh vkhl-yshby bh    s
mh-hv'yl fsl khy fslv ytsrv mskhh vmvrh shqr khy btch ytsr ytsrv 'lyv l'shvt 'lylym 'lmym    s
hvy 'mr l'ts hqytsh 'vry l'bn dvmm hv' yvrh hnh-hv' tfvsh zhb vkhsf vkhl-rvch 'yn bqrbv
vyhvh bhykhl qdshv hs mfnyv khl-h'rts  f
tflh lchbqvq hnby' 'l shgynvt
yhvh shm'ty shm'kh yr'ty yhvh f'lkh bqrb shnym chyyhv bqrb shnym tvdy' brgz rchm tzkhvr
'lvh mtymn ybv' vqdvsh mhr-f'rn slh khsh shmym hvdv vthltv ml'h h'rts
vngh  kh'vr thyh qrnym mydv lv vshm chbyvn 'zh
lfnyv ylkh dbr vyts' rshf lrglyv
'md  vymdd 'rts r'h vytr gvym vytftstsv hrry-'d shchv gb'vt 'vlm hlykhvt 'vlm lv
tcht 'vn r'yty 'hly khvshn yrgzvn yry'vt 'rts mdyn    s
hbnhrym chrh yhvh 'm bnhrym 'fkh 'm-bym 'brtkh khy trkhb 'l-svsykh mrkhbtykh yshv'h
'ryh t'vr qshtkh shb'vt mtvt 'mr slh nhrvt tbq'-'rts
r'vkh ychylv hrym zrm mym 'br ntn thvm qvlv rvm ydyhv nsh'
shmsh yrch 'md zblh l'vr chtsykh yhlkhv lngh brq chnytkh
bz'm tts'd-'rts b'f tdvsh gvym
yts't lysh' 'mkh lysh' 't-mshychkh mchtst r'sh mbyt rsh' 'rvt ysvd 'd-tsv'r slh  f
nqbt bmtyv r'sh [frzv kh] (frzyv q) ys'rv lhfytsny 'lytstm khmv-l'khl 'ny bmstr
drkht bym svsykh chmr mym rbym
shm'ty  vtrgz btny lqvl tsllv shfty ybv' rqb b'tsmy vtchty 'rgz 'shr 'nvch lyvm tsrh l'lvt l'm ygvdnv
khy-t'nh l'-tfrch v'yn ybvl bgfnym khchsh m'shh-zyt vshdmvt l'-'shh 'khl gzr mmkhlh ts'n v'yn bqr brftym
v'ny byhvh ''lvzh 'gylh b'lhy ysh'y
yhvh 'dny chyly vyshm rgly kh'ylvt v'l bmvty ydrkhny lmntsch bngynvty
